अ 18.12.2008 11. 289अ अ अ अ 10.05.79 24 919 अ अ अ अ 30.12.2011 12. 616 24.07.82 25. 511(अ अ अ अ) 18.07.2014 13. 412 07.06.86 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (DEPARTMENT OF PERSONNEL AND TRAINING) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1381(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Andhra Pradesh, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:─ 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Andhra Pradesh” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Andhra Pradesh Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 130 Chief Secretary to the Government of Andhra Pradesh 1 Additional Chief Secretary to Government 2 Additional Chief Secretary to Government, Agriculture 1 Principal Secretary/ Principal Secretary-cum-Commissioner 16 Secretary to Government 11 Secretary to Government-cum-Commissioner 23 -- 3 of 7 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Secretary to CCLA 1 Collectors & District Magistrates 13 Joint Collectors 13 PO, ITDA/PD, DRDA/CEO,ZP 8 Joint Commissioner/ Deputy Commissioner-Commercial Taxes 2 Chief Rationing Officer 1 Directors 28 Additional./Joint/ Deputy Secretaries to Government 10 1 Total Senior Duty Posts 130 2 Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 52 3 State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of item 1 above 32 4 Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of item 1 above 04 5 Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 21 6 Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of the Indian Administrative Service (Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33 1/3% of Item 1, 2, 3 & 4 above 72 7 Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 167 Total Authorised Strength 239” [F. No.11031/3/2016-AIS-II(A)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. Note 1: Prior to the issue of this notification, the Total Authorized Strength of Andhra Pradesh IAS Cadre was 211. Note 2: The principal Regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide SRO No. 3350, dated 22.10.1955. Subsequently, they were amended in respect of the Andhra Pradesh Cadre of Indian Administrative Service vide following G.S.R. numbers and dates:- Sl.No. GSR No. Date Sl.No. GSR No. Date 1. 663 29.06.74 14. 765 20.09.86 2. 1201 16.11.74 15. 646 02.09.89 3. 94 25.01.75 16. 647 02.10.90 4. 433 05.04.75 17. 755E 15.12.93 5. 51E 01.02.77 18. 573E 13.07.94 6. 544E 29.07.77 19. 319E 31.03.95 7. 44 14.01.78 20. 304 22.07.97 8. 469 14.01.78 21. 171 09.05.2000 9. 846 14.07.78 22. 786E 24.12.2007 10. 1237 14.10.78 23. 862E 18.12.2008 11. 289E 10.05.79 24 919 E 30.12.2011 12. 616 24.07.82 25. 511(E) 18.07.2014 13. 412 07.06.86 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. II म犆,— (क) तािलका म犆 रा榖य सरकार犘 के अधीन भारतीय 灹शासिनक सेवा के व琇र瀠ठ वेतनमान से ऊपर के वेतन वाले पद犘 से संबंिधत भाग क म犆, 灹थम कॉलम म犆 आने वाली ““““आ瀈灷 आ瀈灷 आ瀈灷 आ瀈灷 灹देश 灹देश 灹देश 灹देश”””” 灹िवि玗 तथा 10.11.2016 2 1178 (अ) 27.12.2016 3 1194 (अ) 30.12.2016 4 575 (अ) 12.06.2017 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th November, 2017 G.S.R. 1382(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Andhra Pradesh hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, namely: ─ 1. (1) These rules may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Pay) Rules, 2016, in Schedule II,– (a) in Part A relating to Posts carrying pay above the Senior Scale of pay of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments, in the table, for the entry “Andhra Pradesh” occurring in the first column and corresponding entries in the second column, the following shall be substituted namely:─ -- 6 of 7 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 “Andhra Pradesh Chief Secretary to the Government of Andhra Pradesh Level 17 in the pay matrix Additional Chief Secretary to Government Level 17 in the pay matrix Additional Chief Secretary to Government, Agriculture Level 17 in the pay matrix Principal Secretary/ Principal Secretary-cum-Commissioner Level 15 in the pay matrix Secretary to Government Level 14 in the pay matrix Secretary to Government-cum-Commissioner Level 14 in the pay matrix” (b) in Part B relating to Posts carrying pay in the Senior Scale of the Indian Administrative Service under the State Governments including posts carrying Special Allowance in addition to pay, in the table for the entries occurring under Andhra Pradesh the following shall be substituted,– “Secretary to CCLA Collectors & District Magistrates Joint Collectors PO, ITDA/PD, DRDA/CEO,ZP Joint Commissioner/ Deputy Commissioner-Commercial Taxes Chief Rationing Officer Directors Additional./Joint/ Deputy Secretaries to Government” [F. No.11031/3/2016-AIS-II(B)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy.
